title: Sentinel-as-Code Watchlist
description: Schema for Sentinel-as-Code watchlist metadata (watchlist.json). The data lives alongside in data.csv/data.tsv.

watchlistAlias.description: Unique alias used in KQL via _GetWatchlist(...). Must match the containing folder name.

displayName.description: Human-readable name shown in the Sentinel UI.

provider.description: Set to Custom for custom watchlists.

itemsSearchKey.description: Column name used as the primary key. Must match a CSV header exactly (case-sensitive).
